purpose: Fresh agent-side workbench derived from the current rollup only. It replaces stale backlog rows for the next CAD slot-binding pass and does not ask for user validation.
rules: Use only this current workbench for the next binding pass; older backlog files may contain stale slot states.
A source packet is a search aid, not a binding.
Do not create final wall cuts, frames, glass, doors or material assignments from this workbench.
Ask user validation only after a slot has exact CAD binding evidence and a readable review artifact.
